retrieved_result: ABAP ALV-GRID Export to Excel: multiline text output in cells \"Home / Information / SAP @en ABAP ALV-GRID Export to Excel: multiline text output in cells This is an example of how to fill several lines of data with ALV GRID and the Export to Excel cells.
